message:
fix(freeze): fix special_object opcode and vstack flush for closure vars

- Fix special_object opcode to handle all 8 sub-types correctly:
  - ARGUMENTS (0): Now calls JS_NewArguments to create proper arguments object
  - MAPPED_ARGUMENTS (1): Same as ARGUMENTS for frozen code
  - THIS_FUNC, NEW_TARGET, HOME_OBJECT (2-4): Return undefined
  - VAR_OBJECT (5): Creates new object (was the only one working before)
  - IMPORT_META (6): Calls JS_GetImportMetaCurrent
  - NULL_PROTO (7): Creates object with null prototype

- Add JS_NewArguments and JS_GetImportMetaCurrent extern declarations

- Fix get_var_ref in relooper to use vpush instead of flush+printLine:
  - Prevents premature vstack flush that corrupts stack position refs
  - Closure var expression is self-contained (no stack refs), safe to defer

This fixes lodash functions like _.difference that use the arguments object
via the baseRest wrapper pattern. Previously arguments.length was always 0.
